claim: Maintaining clean code architecture with intentional module design directly improves AI coding assistant effectiveness, because codebases easy to change for humans are also easy for AI to change.
actionable: Apply domain-driven design and deep module patterns to your codebase before using AI coding assistants, ensuring simple interfaces and clear module boundaries.
source_title: Senior Dev: This "Grill Me" Prompt Is Going Viral Among Top Engineers

claim: The narrow waist concept from internet architecture (TCP/IP as dominant standard) applies to code design: define clear input/output contracts while allowing flexible internal implementation.
actionable: Design APIs and module boundaries with explicit contracts at the edges while leaving implementation details flexible for AI modification.
source_title: Senior Dev: This "Grill Me" Prompt Is Going Viral Among Top Engineers

claim: Creating a ubiquitous language document that defines domain-specific terms helps AI understand your system better and enables clearer prompts with fewer hallucinations.
actionable: Maintain a markdown file in your repo documenting all domain-specific terminology and keep it available in your prompt context when requesting AI assistance.
source_title: Senior Dev: This "Grill Me" Prompt Is Going Viral Among Top Engineers

claim: The 'Grill Me' prompt skill forces AI to iteratively refine understanding through hostile questioning until reaching shared design concepts, improving alignment on complex tasks.
actionable: Use a grill-me style prompt that asks AI to relentlessly question assumptions about requirements until both parties agree on the design before implementation.
source_title: Senior Dev: This "Grill Me" Prompt Is Going Viral Among Top Engineers

claim: TypeScript is becoming the dominant language for AI applications and web development because of its rich ecosystem, frameworks like Next.js, and superior UX focus.
actionable: Consider TypeScript for AI applications especially when building chat interfaces and full-stack services where UX is critical.
source_title: Senior Dev: This "Grill Me" Prompt Is Going Viral Among Top Engineers

claim: Knowledge vs. skills vs. wisdom are three distinct educational categories; AI can assist with wisdom-seeking through iterative discussion, a capability books and lectures cannot easily provide.
actionable: Use AI conversations for wisdom-building on complex engineering topics by asking for diverse perspectives and edge-case discussions.
source_title: Senior Dev: This "Grill Me" Prompt Is Going Viral Among Top Engineers

claim: The inversion of control principle matters in AI coding: increased visibility and control over AI behavior means trading off ease-of-use for observability and customization.
actionable: Choose between high-level abstractions (like Claude Code with little visibility) or low-level primitives (like Pydantic AI) based on your need for control vs. simplicity.
source_title: Senior Dev: This "Grill Me" Prompt Is Going Viral Among Top Engineers
